legal.privacyIntro: This Privacy Policy explains what personal data ft_verse collects when you use the application, why we collect it, and the rights you have over it.

privacySections.title: 1. Data we collect
privacySections.body: When you register we collect your username, email address and password (stored only as a salted hash, never in clear text). If you sign in with your 42 account, we receive your 42 login, email and profile picture. While you use the service we also store data you generate: your avatar, time spent connected (logtime), the blocks and contributions you place in the shared world, your friends list, messages, game results and your preferences (language and theme).

privacySections.title: 2. How we use your data
privacySections.body: We use your data only to operate the service: to authenticate you, display your profile and presence to other players, save your world contributions and progress, manage your friendships and chat, and remember your settings. We do not sell your data or use it for advertising.

privacySections.title: 3. Legal basis
privacySections.body: We process your data to provide the service you signed up for and, where applicable, on the basis of your consent. You can withdraw consent at any time by deleting your account.

privacySections.title: 4. Third parties
privacySections.body: Authentication can be handled through the 42 OAuth service when you choose to log in with 42; in that case 42 processes your login according to its own privacy policy. We do not share your personal data with any other third party except where required by law.

privacySections.title: 5. Data retention
privacySections.body: We keep your data for as long as your account exists. When your account is deleted, your personal data (profile, email, credentials) is removed. Anonymised or aggregated data, and shared world contributions that cannot be linked back to you, may be retained.

privacySections.title: 6. Your rights
privacySections.body: You have the right to access, correct or delete your personal data, to object to or restrict its processing, and to request a copy of the data you provided. Most information can be updated from your profile settings.

privacySections.title: 7. Security
privacySections.body: Passwords are stored as salted hashes and access to the application is protected by authentication tokens served over an encrypted (HTTPS/WSS) connection. While no system can be guaranteed perfectly secure, we apply reasonable measures to protect your data.

privacySections.title: 8. Cookies and local storage
privacySections.body: We use your browser's local storage to keep you signed in and to remember preferences such as your chosen language. These are strictly necessary for the application to work and are not used for tracking or advertising.

privacySections.title: 9. Changes and contact
privacySections.body: We may update this Privacy Policy; the date above indicates the latest version. For any question about your personal data, contact the project administrators through the application.

legal.termsIntro: These Terms of Service govern your use of ft_verse. By creating an account or using the application, you agree to these terms.

termsSections.title: 1. Acceptance of the terms
termsSections.body: By accessing or using ft_verse you agree to be bound by these Terms of Service and by the Privacy Policy. If you do not agree, please do not use the application.

termsSections.title: 2. Account & eligibility
termsSections.body: ft_verse is an educational project intended for 42 students. You must provide accurate information when registering and you are responsible for keeping your credentials secure and for all activity under your account.

termsSections.title: 3. Acceptable use
termsSections.body: You agree not to misuse the service: no cheating or exploiting bugs, no harassment of other users, and no offensive, illegal or infringing content in usernames, chat messages, avatars or world contributions.

termsSections.title: 4. User content
termsSections.body: You remain responsible for the content you create (blocks, messages, avatar, profile). You grant the application the right to store and display this content as part of normal operation. We may moderate or remove content that breaches these terms.

termsSections.title: 5. Virtual coins and items
termsSections.body: Coins are derived from your 42 logtime and are used only to place blocks inside the application. They have no monetary value, cannot be exchanged for money, and are not transferable between accounts.

termsSections.title: 6. Moderation & enforcement
termsSections.body: Administrators may warn, suspend, or delete accounts, and edit or remove world contributions, in order to enforce these terms and keep the shared world usable for everyone.

termsSections.title: 7. Availability & changes
termsSections.body: The service is provided "as is" as part of a school project. It may be modified, interrupted or discontinued at any time, and we do not guarantee uninterrupted availability or that data will be retained indefinitely.

termsSections.title: 8. Limitation of liability
termsSections.body: To the extent permitted by law, ft_verse and its team are not liable for any loss or damage arising from the use of, or inability to use, this educational application.

termsSections.title: 9. Termination
termsSections.body: You may stop using the service and request deletion of your account at any time. We may suspend or terminate access in case of a breach of these terms.

termsSections.title: 10. Changes and contact
termsSections.body: We may update these Terms of Service; the date above indicates the latest version. For any question, contact the project administrators through the application.

tutorial.welcome_body: Explore, build, and design 3D islands in a shared voxel universe!
tutorial.planets_private_body: Your own creative space where you are the sole master. Build without limits and in complete privacy.
tutorial.planets_campus_body: A shared world with other students from your campus. Collaborate, share resources, and build together!
tutorial.votes_body_2: Each season features a building phase followed by a voting phase. Visit other campus members' islands and vote for the best one!
tutorial.votes_winner_reward: Winners earn rewards and enter history!
